action.reasoning: Observation: rmse_z500 improved to 456.74 (val 459.16) with ~9M param ResNet (h=192/b=12), lat-weighted MSE, stride=2, 25 epochs; loss drops to ~0.02 immediately then plateaus but val RMSE keeps improving slowly to end. Analysis: capacity still limits capturing full atmospheric dynamics (fast convergence suggests underparameterized for 3-day forecast); larger model can help without changing other hyperparameters much. Decision: scale to h=256/blocks=12 (~15M params, still <<1B), adjust lr=1.5e-4, bs_train=32 (to fit in VRAM), epochs=20 (per >20-epoch rule + time budget), update model defaults/calls in model.py/train.py/predict.py; this should yield further RMSE drop while keeping iter ~1.5-2h within remaining ~3.6h budget; submit eval after.
